seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Suzanne Collins sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “They can fatten me up. They can give me a full body polish, dress me up, and make me beautif…

frase_original: They can fatten me up. They can give me a full body polish, dress me up, and make me beautiful again. They can design dream weapons that come to life in my hands, but they will never again brainwash me into the necessity of using them. I no longer feel allegiance to these monsters called human beings, despite being one myself.
